content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Umbrel: Customer Support (non-technical) Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote </p> <p>In this role, you will:</p><ul><li><p>Support our users across all online channels (email, Discord, website chat, forums, social medias, etc) for non-technical issues (such as Umbrel Home order related queries)</p></li><li><p>Work with our logistics and fulfillment team to resolve order/shipping issues</p></li><li><p>Help users with various non-technical tasks, such as order modifications, returns, replacements, and repairs</p></li><li><p>Create how-tos, guides, wikis, knowledge base, etc for recurring questions</p></li></ul><p></p><p>We hope you:</p><ul><li><p>Have great written communication skills</p></li><li><p>Like talking to users and are willing to constantly do so without external encouragement</p></li><li><p>Are able to empathize with users, and genuinely care about their problems — we can’t exist without them</p></li></ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/umbrel-customer-support-non-technical">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/umbrel-customer-support-non-technical</a></p> Sat, 06 Jun 2026 20:31:08 +0000 Mon, 06 Jul 2026 20:31:08 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/umbrel-customer-support-non-technical https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/umbrel-customer-support-non-technical Dentology: Full Stack Product Engineer Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> UK (Remote) </p> <p><strong>If you’re an exceptional coder, love shaping product, and are excited by the chance to work with bleeding-edge AI - this is your role.</strong></p><p></p><p>Dentology is one of the UK’s fastest-growing performance marketing agencies, partnering exclusively with high-end cosmetic dental practices. We’re a 30+ person team spanning across content, ads, sales, and engineering - and one of the only agencies building an end-to-end patient acquisition system that blends agency services with proprietary software.</p><p></p><p>Our platform combines real-time lead tracking, performance analytics, and AI-driven insights to give practices unprecedented visibility into what’s driving results. From high-production content shoots and paid campaigns to in-house sales teams who close the leads, we deliver predictable, profitable growth for some of the biggest names in UK dentistry.</p><p></p><p><strong>Role Overview</strong></p><p>We’re looking for a Full Stack Product Engineer to join us and help build a product that will transform how dental practices attract and convert patients. You’ll work across the stack, from database to frontend, and take ownership of key features, integrations, and user experiences. You’ll collaborate closely with the founders (marketing + tech backgrounds), bringing your own ideas to the table, influencing product direction, and helping us move fast with high-quality, clean, and scalable code.</p><p></p><p><strong>What you'll be doing</strong></p><ul><li><p>Take ownership of engineering projects, delivering features end-to-end - from database design to polished frontend.</p></li><li><p>Build and scale resilient backend services and high-usage API integrations.</p></li><li><p>Collaborate with the team to align technical execution with real-world clinic needs and marketing performance goals.</p></li><li><p>Help shape the engineering culture, setting best practices, tooling standards, and mentoring future hires.</p></li><li><p>Drive continuous improvements to our UX/UI, working closely with non-technical team members to deliver seamless user experiences.</p></li><li><p>Tackle challenges like real-time data syncing, performance optimisation, lead-tracking infrastructure, and AI-enhanced tools.</p></li><li><p>Contribute ideas around product strategy - we want you thinking beyond code.</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>What we're looking for</strong></p><ul><li><p>2+ years of full stack experience with React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, or similar web frameworks</p></li><li><p>Solid understanding of data flows and state management in web applications</p></li><li><p>Experience working with Prisma, PostgreSQL, and building robust API integrations</p></li><li><p>A passion for clean, scalable code and practical solutions</p></li><li><p>Empathy for the user - understanding how they interact with the product and shaping the experience to meet their needs</p></li><li><p>Curiosity - a willingness to learn quickly, adapt, and grow with new technologies</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Success in the Role</strong></p><p>6 Months:</p><ul><li><p>Gain deep expertise in our entire tech stack, including deployments and infrastructure</p></li><li><p>Take ownership of smaller features, ensuring high-quality delivery and end-to-end responsibility</p></li><li><p>Become the go-to person for understanding how all systems work together and contribute to ongoing projects</p></li><li><p>Work autonomously on both frontend and backend development, applying best practices across the full stack</p></li></ul><p></p><p>12 Months:</p><ul><li><p>Play a key role in hiring, working closely with the engineering team to evaluate potential candidates</p></li><li><p>Take on mentorship responsibilities, helping junior developers grow their skills</p></li><li><p>Contribute to engineering decisions around architecture, tech stack improvements, and development practices</p></li><li><p>Lead efforts in scaling systems, optimising performance, and ensuring robustness of integrations</p></li></ul><p></p><p>18 Months +:</p><ul><li><p>Lead a team of developers, managing projects and ensuring delivery aligns with product goals</p></li><li><p>Take ownership of more strategic decisions, including setting long-term engineering direction</p></li><li><p>Mentor and guide other engineers on complex problems, promoting a culture of technical excellence and collaboration</p></li><li><p>Influence the company’s growth trajectory by playing a major role in key product and engineering initiatives</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Why Join Us</strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Incredible category</strong> – We’re blending agency speed with SaaS scalability in a niche ripe for disruption.</p></li><li><p><strong>Cutting-edge tech</strong> – Work with the latest AI and workflows.</p></li><li><p><strong>Real ownership</strong
